Notice Of Motion & Motion For Order To Show Cause Why Carlene M. Henderson, Indiv. Should Not Be Held In Contempt
Off Calendar Jul-14-2006 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mo To Compel Ans To Post Judgt Disco
Off Calendar Jan-24-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to post judgment interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $336.30 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
